title: My Therapeutic Approach
excerpt: Holistic, client-centred psychotherapy — CBT, IFS, EFT, and more.
body:
I adopt a **holistic approach** to treatment, understanding that an individual's issues are multifaceted, with culture often playing a significant role. I strive to provide care centred around you, the client — recognizing there is no one-size-fits-all solution.

What works for one person may not work for another. Therefore, I choose therapeutic modalities based on what **you** feel comfortable with, rather than what I am most familiar with.

Modalities may include:

- Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT)
- Solution-Focused Brief Therapy (SFBT)
- Internal Family Systems (IFS)
- Emotionally Focused Therapy (EFT)

## Finding your way back to light

Many of us feel stuck at some point — whether from job loss, complicated relationships, life transitions, or patterns that seem impossible to break. The journey to self-discovery involves exploring beliefs, fears, and desires that shape your life. It can be daunting, and it can be deeply rewarding.

I understand the darkness you may feel, because I have been there too. Together, we can work toward a life filled with **light, clarity, and purpose** — at a pace you choose, with emotional safety and informed consent at the centre of our work.

> The path to light and purpose is within your reach. Reach out for support, take small steps each day, and have faith in your ability to overcome your challenges.
